rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Elec. Code §32.091 governs compensation for election judges and clerks at polling places. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operational intersection.
quote: an election judge or clerk is entitled to compensation for services rendered at a precinct polling place at an hourly rate not to exceed the amount fixed by the appropriate authority
_note: No conflict; cited rule is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
